programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.desc: Tintin and his friends go on an exciting treasure hunt.

programme.desc: While mini-golfing, Ben is attacked by the Ground Hawgs, a gang of Dr. Animo mutants turned bikers. Ben must turn alien to stop them before they set their sights on the city down the road.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: It is now June, and the park is bathed in 17 hours of daylight. With the warm temperatures come rich pickings, but for the newborn the summer months are crucial as they learn to fight, find food and avoid predators.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is when stags compete to breed, osprey chicks begin a 3000-mile migration to West Africa, salmon return to the rivers where they were born and adders give birth to live young.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is in the Franschhoek Valley, exploring the endless bounty of Boschendal Wine Estate.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Continuing to listen to his heart, Warren deepens his love of wine by venturing to the lesser known town of Hermanus, where he’ll visit Newton Johnson, the ‘wine farm with a view’.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is heading out of Cape Town into the more quiet coastal area of the Western Cape, and the picturesque town of Paternoster. It’s here he’ll marvel at the seaside village feel and take an e-bike ride along the beach.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: As the final stanza in Warren’s Food Trail of South Africa, he’s back in the bush, a quintessential part of all travel to the rainbow nation.

programme.title: Taste of the Territory
programme.desc: Jimmy heads to the bustling Rapid Creek markets, mingling amongst the food stalls, produce growers, and locals out for their weekly shop.

programme.title: Taste of the Territory
programme.desc: Jimmy meets some of the Greek community preparing food for the Greek cultural festival; he visits the colourful Malak Night Market.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang wastong pagamit ng mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Discover what are percents, polygons, circles, solid figures, sequences, time, circumference, and how to solve simple equations.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa mga pagbabago sa lipunan ng sinaunang Pilipino kabilang ang pagpupunyagi ng ilang pangkat na mapanatili ang kalayaan sa Kolonyalismong Espanyol at ang impluwensya nito sa kasalukuyan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Grade 7 Filipino
programme.desc: Maliwanagan kung ano ang suprasegmental, pagbubuod, pagsusuri at paghahambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, at kung paano gamitin ang angkop na pahayag at panadang anaporik at kataporik na pangngalan.

programme.title: Grade 7 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of geometry of shapes and sizes, and geometric relationships.

programme.title: Grade 7 English
programme.desc: Learn how to use multimedia resources and oral language when giving information, and how to express one's belief, cite evidence, and reign in thoughts in public forums.

programme.desc: Alamin ang mga pagbabago, pag-unlad at pagpapatuloy sa Timog at Kanlurang Asya sa transisyonal at makabagong panahon (ika-16 hanggang ika-20 siglo).

programme.title: Grade 7 Science

Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: Get Help
programme.desc: Sandra, a psychotherapist, has just been hired as therapist by a new online service. As soon as she rushes home to tell her live-in partner the good news, she sees him leaving with no explanation. Sandra is devastated and needs to know why she was dumped.

programme.title: Standing Up For Sunny
programme.desc: When Travis, a self-isolated recluse with low-grade cerebral palsy and anger management issues falls for Sunny, an unassuming comedian, he must take the stage to show his true self and win her love.

programme.title: Murder in the Finist ère
programme.desc: When a storm fells a sacred oak in Brittany, Captain Morgane Ledantec uncovers human bones tied to a druidic past she once shared. As Morgane’s buried gift of foresight resurfaces, she must confront old friends hiding secrets of their own.

programme.title: Almost Entirely A Slight Disaster
programme.desc: In contemporary Istanbul, four youths in their twenties find themselves brought together by chance. Restless, disillusioned, and searching for direction, the four characters go face to face with the anxieties of their generation.

programme.title: Dogworld
programme.desc: In the near future, two friends dream of leaving the Italian city of Taranto, a wasteland ruled over by warring gangs and surrounded by barbed wire. Recruited by a local gang, and with a girl coming between them, their friendship is put to the test.

programme.title: All For Diego
programme.desc: Pablo and Diego are two brothers working as dishwashers at a bar while playing soccer in the afternoons. After Diego falls victim to a hit and run, Pablo enters into a soccer tournament in order to pay for the surgeries needed to keep his brother alive.

programme.title: 3 Meters Above The Sky
programme.desc: An upper middle class good girl falls for a bad boy on the wrong side of the tracks. It is a first love that is at once passionate and tempestuous. Released in Spain in 2010, it was a major box office hit.

programme.title: A Butterfly's Heart
programme.desc: Juozapas is a quiet boy who cultivates insects in an abandoned house. He has a big bulge under his weird sweater and the school’s tough kids call him “balloon”. Rugilè moves to town and becomes Juozapas’ friend. She is the first to discover his secret.

programme.title: Get Help
programme.desc: Sandra, a psychotherapist, has just been hired as therapist by a new online service. As soon as she rushes home to tell her live-in partner the good news, she sees him leaving with no explanation. Sandra is devastated and needs to know why she was dumped.

programme.title: American Skin
programme.desc: Lincoln Jefferson, an Iraqi War veteran, working as a school janitor tries to mend his relationship with his son after a divorce. When his son is killed by a police officer found innocent without standing trial, he takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: The President
programme.desc: After a brutal coup topples his regime, a fallen dictator flees with his young grandson. Disguised as street musicians, they cross a country scarred by his rule, exposed firsthand to the suffering he had ignored.

programme.title: The Last Harvest
programme.desc: Traumatized policeman Ben delves into his own past to investigate a cold case obscured by a web of guilt, lies and deception. In the process, Marion, a doctor, helps him come to terms with himself and his past.

programme.title: A Yard of Jackals
programme.desc: During the oppressive Chilean dictatorship, a lonely model maker takes refuge in the apparent peace of his neighborhood. However, his life is upended when mysterious neighbors arrive, unleashing a spiral of horror and violence that will leave deep scars.

programme.title: Murder in Biot
programme.desc: A wealthy heiress is poisoned during a dinner of the Biot Trade Association. All the guests are potential suspects. Two days later, one of the guests dies leaving a suicide note and confessing to the murder. But Deputy Prosecutor Richard is unconvinced.

While overseeing renovations to her beach house in 1970s Chile, Carmen’s quiet life is upended when a priest asks her to hide a wounded fugitive. As she steps beyond her quiet life, Carmen is pulled into the undercurrents of a politically tumultuous Chile.

programme.title: Hollywood Squares S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: A reboot of the classic game show, where celebrities face contestants seated at desks arranged vertically. Contestants judge the celebrities' responses to questions to determine winners.

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 4
programme.desc: Diana Ser investigates how the global fuel crisis could push up Singapore’s electricity bills, and what households can do if higher prices are here to stay.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 1
programme.desc: In this first episode, Joey leaves her tech career to save her dad’s roast meat business, while Megan fights to revive her mother’s struggling lighting shop with bold new ideas and a fresh perspective.

programme.title: All For Diego
programme.desc: Pablo and Diego are two brothers working as dishwashers at a bar while playing soccer in the afternoons. After Diego falls victim to a hit and run, Pablo enters into a soccer tournament in order to pay for the surgeries needed to keep his brother alive.

programme.title: A Butterfly's Heart
programme.desc: Juozapas is a quiet boy who cultivates insects in an abandoned house. He has a big bulge under his weird sweater and the school’s tough kids call him “balloon”. Rugilè moves to town and becomes Juozapas’ friend. She is the first to discover his secret.

programme.title: American Skin
programme.desc: Lincoln Jefferson, an Iraqi War veteran, working as a school janitor tries to mend his relationship with his son after a divorce. When his son is killed by a police officer found innocent without standing trial, he takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Joy Of Fatherhood
programme.desc: Felix enjoys his single life to the fullest, but a ferret bites him, sterilizing him in the process. He tries everything in his power to find the soon-to-be mother of his only child, the result of his first and last sperm donation.

programme.title: The Last Harvest
programme.desc: Traumatized policeman Ben delves into his own past to investigate a cold case obscured by a web of guilt, lies and deception. In the process, Marion, a doctor, helps him come to terms with himself and his past.

programme.title: The Inland Road
programme.desc: After surviving a car crash when running away from home, Tia finds herself having nowhere to go. Seeking out the family of the crash victim, she moves in with them and threatens to upend the family’s delicate balance.

programme.title: A Yard of Jackals
programme.desc: During the oppressive Chilean dictatorship, a lonely model maker takes refuge in the apparent peace of his neighborhood. However, his life is upended when mysterious neighbors arrive, unleashing a spiral of horror and violence that will leave deep scars.

programme.title: Behind the Mountains
programme.desc: After spending four years in jail for vandalizing his place of work, Rafik has only one plan, take his son to the mountains and show him his amazing discovery.

programme.title: Murder in Biot
programme.desc: A wealthy heiress is poisoned during a dinner of the Biot Trade Association. All the guests are potential suspects. Two days later, one of the guests dies leaving a suicide note and confessing to the murder. But Deputy Prosecutor Richard is unconvinced.

programme.title: All the Blue in the Sky
programme.desc: Emile with early-onset Alzheimer’s disease and only a few months to live leaves everything behind to embark on a road trip with an enigmatic young woman he’s just met through a classified ad.

While overseeing renovations to her beach house in 1970s Chile, Carmen’s quiet life is upended when a priest asks her to hide a wounded fugitive. As she steps beyond her quiet life, Carmen is pulled into the undercurrents of a politically tumultuous Chile.

programme.title: Deal At The Border
programme.desc: Aza and Samat, two drug runners navigating the secret routes in the mountains of Central Asia, stumble upon Nazik, a young girl fleeing from slavery. When Nazik is recaptured by a criminal, facing a grim return to captivity, Aza resolves to save her.

programme.title: ASIA
programme.desc: Motherhood has not been easy for Asia, a single mother whose teenage daughter, Vika, barely interacts with her. But when Vika’s health deteriorates rapidly, Asia must step in and become the mother Vika so desperately needs.

programme.title: With Or Without You
programme.desc: A young woman, her free-spirited mother and a West African man find themselves on an unexpected road trip that leads to emotional transformation.
